text.title: enum-constraints-closed-vocabularies Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for enum-constraints-closed-vocabularies as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Listing the valid values inside the prompt body (or Field description) but keeping the field type as str.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Soft constraints. The model usually obeys but drifts under long context, low temperature variation, or small models — and a single wrong label silently breaks the next pipeline stage. Enums move the constraint into the decoder mask, where it cannot drift.

failure-mode.description: Trusting JSON-mode output to respect an enum without post-validation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mini/nano models hallucinate enum values under JSON-mode-only fallback. Reported on OpenAI Community threads — the schema is shown to the model but never enforced by the decoder. Production systems must either upgrade to strict mode or validate-and-retry.
